summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Kalshi Live Trading Integration for PredictPod. All 25 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend Settings UI verified with all required components present and functional.

issues: Minor: React hydration warning about <tr> inside <span> - doesn't affect functionality. This is a React DOM nesting warning during dev mode.

critical_code_review_comments: Encryption service properly uses Fernet with environment-based key (KALSHI_KEYS_ENCRYPTION_KEY)
Live trading requires 5 conditions to be met: credentials exist, credentials validated, server flag enabled, user toggle enabled, user confirmed risk, no kill switch - secure by design
Real Kalshi adapter exists at /app/backend/adapters/kalshi/real_adapter.py - will work with valid API credentials
test_credentials: None - used TEST_* prefix test data, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Kalshi Live Trading integration tested. All settings endpoints working: GET/POST/DELETE /settings/kalshi_keys, POST /settings/kalshi_keys/validate, GET/PUT /settings/guardrails, POST/DELETE /admin/kill_switch, POST /settings/live_trading/enable and /disable. Frontend Settings page shows Trading Mode (with PAPER badge), Kalshi API Configuration (API Key ID + Private Key inputs), Live Trading Guardrails (5 inputs), Paper Trading Risk Limits. Live trading is MOCKED (MockKalshiAdapter) by default - real RealKalshiAdapter requires valid Kalshi API credentials.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/settings: Returns kalshi section with trading mode and status
backend_endpoints.GET /api/settings/kalshi_keys: Returns credential status without exposing secrets
backend_endpoints.POST /api/settings/kalshi_keys: Saves encrypted credentials, returns masked key
backend_endpoints.DELETE /api/settings/kalshi_keys: Deletes credentials and disables live trading
backend_endpoints.POST /api/settings/live_trading/enable: Enables live trading with risk confirmation
backend_endpoints.GET /api/admin/audit_log: Returns audit trail of trading events

frontend_settings_page.trading_mode_section: Shows Paper Trading status with PAPER badge
frontend_settings_page.api_configuration: API Key ID input and Private Key textarea present
frontend_settings_page.guardrails_section: All 5 inputs present (Max $ per Trade, Max Open Exposure, Max Daily Loss, Max Trades per Hour, Max Trades per Day)
frontend_settings_page.paper_trading_banner: Visible at top of all pages: 'PAPER TRADING MODE - All trades are simulated...'

security_features.risk_confirmation_required: Must confirm risks before enabling live trading
security_features.multiple_gates_for_live: 5 conditions must be met for live trading

mocked_apis_list: Kalshi Market Data API - via MockKalshiAdapter for paper trading
Kalshi Trading API - via MockKalshiAdapter for paper trading
mocked_apis.real_adapter_ready: RealKalshiAdapter at /app/backend/adapters/kalshi/real_adapter.py - requires valid Kalshi API credentials to test
